name: Phase 33: WebSocket Transport Prep
description: Create transport/ package with abstraction layer for stdio, HTTP, and WebSocket transports. Provides adapter pattern so mcpkit is transport-agnostic.
completion: transport/ package exists with stdio and HTTP adapters working, WebSocket stub compiles, middleware chain functional.

tasks.description: Define Transport interface in transport/transport.go: Start, Stop, Send, Receive, Protocol (returns transport type string). Define TransportMiddleware signature matching registry middleware pattern.
Implement StdioTransport in transport/stdio.go wrapping existing mcp-go stdio transport. Adapter converts between Transport interface and mcp-go server.StdioTransport.
Implement HTTPTransport in transport/http.go wrapping mcp-go streamable HTTP. Adapter for StreamableHTTP transport with session management hooks.
Create WebSocketTransport stub in transport/ws.go. Implements Transport interface but returns ErrNotImplemented for all methods. Placeholder for June 2026 spec.
Implement transport middleware chain in transport/middleware.go. Support logging, metrics, and panic recovery at the transport level.
Write transport/transport_test.go (interface compliance), transport/stdio_test.go, transport/http_test.go, transport/middleware_test.go. Target 90%+ coverage.
